package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for loadhtmlglob_or_loadhtmlfiles_in_request_path: LoadHTMLGlob or LoadHTMLFiles called on request paths instead of startup initialization.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule323NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule323NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule323NegativeRecord) (Rule323NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario323Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule323NegativeService, input Rule323NegativeRecord) (Rule323NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule323NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
